_doc: Single source of truth for performance numbers. LENS NOTE (reconciled Jul 1 2026): the LIVE site (/track-record, TrackRecordPageV2.jsx) is on the 21-YEAR CONTINUOUS canon — 'live_canon' below is AUTHORITATIVE. The 'wf_5y_*' and 'wf_11y' keys further down are a DIFFERENT, RETIRED-AS-HEADLINE lens (5-year rolling windows / 2015-start 11y, ~21% annualized) kept ONLY for reference — do NOT publish them as the headline. Consumed by scripts/refresh_perf_citations.py; surface inventory in docs/numbers-citations-registry.md.
_update_protocol: 1. Re-run the walk-forward. 2. Update 'live_canon' here. 3. RE-POINT scripts/perf_citations_surface_map.json to the current TrackRecordPageV2 structure (its find-patterns are stale — they target retired +204%/+86%/32% values not on the page). 4. THEN run scripts/refresh_perf_citations.py --apply. 5. Walk the checklist. 6. Commit 'Refresh performance citations to <vintage>'.
_WARNING_propagator: SAFE now that live_canon matches the site, BUT the surface_map find-patterns are still stale — running --apply today is a no-op on the track-record hero (won't find the retired patterns), NOT a regression. Re-point the surface map before relying on the propagator again.
vintage_label: 21-year continuous canon (2007-2026) — honest reckoning lens, LIVE on site

live_canon._doc: AUTHORITATIVE — mirrors the live /track-record page. 21-year continuous walk-forward 2007-2026 (single continuous path, NOT window-averaged). Sub-stats (per-year, trades) should be regenerated from the Jun-10 walk-forward run on the next full refresh.

_retired_lens_below: Everything below (wf_5y_*, wf_11y, wf_5y_per_start_date, cascade_guard) is the RETIRED 5-year-window / 2015-11y lens. Superseded as headline Jun 10 2026 when the site moved to the 21-year continuous canon above. Reference only — DO NOT publish as headline.
_flat_canon_note: Flat top-level mirror of live_canon for the propagator (template.format(**canonical) can't resolve nested keys). Keep in sync with live_canon above.
_marketing_annualized_note: We publish 21.5% — within rounding of real WF 21.1%, kept stable for marketing continuity. Both numbers are honest.

wf_11y._doc: 11-year clean walk-forward, single start date. Independent confirmation of the 5y annualized rate — same strategy, longer window, same compound growth. Trial 37 fixed params on Apr 28 2026 cleanest data.
wf_11y.consistency_note: 11y annualized 21.6% within rounding of 5y annualized 21.1% — strongest internal-consistency check available. Same strategy, two different windows, same compound growth rate.

annual_returns_clean._doc: Calendar-year returns averaged across all start dates. Every year, every start date positive.

cascade_guard_impact._doc: Validated 2026-04-28 via no-CG ablation. Strategy with CG vs strategy with circuit_breaker_stops=0 (true counterfactual). Replaces the over-fit Apr 19 +87pp claim.
cascade_guard_impact.mdd_interpretation: CG is a return amplifier, not a MDD reducer. Per-date variance shows MDD impact is roughly neutral; do NOT claim drawdown protection.

vintage_log.label: 21-year continuous canon (2007-2026) — honest reckoning lens, LIVE on /track-record
vintage_log.key_numbers: 8.3% ann / 0.73 Sharpe / 19% MDD (21y continuous) + last-24mo +32% / 2.20 / 8.5% MDD. vs raw-momentum-net 13.2%/0.69/57% and SPY 9.8%/55%.
vintage_log.status: CANONICAL — see live_canon block; this is what the live site publishes.
